ham.subject: Ticket #JIRA-1234 Resolved – Code Merge Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just wanted to let you know that the Jira ticket #JIRA-1234 (Feature: Add user profile picture) has been resolved. I have merged the changes into the main branch and pushed the PR to GitHub (PR #5678). The unit tests are passing and the code review is complete.

Please take a moment to pull the latest changes and run your local tests. Let me know if you encounter any issues.

Thanks,
Rahul

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Microsoft 365 Password is Expiring Soon – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire within the next 48 hours. To ensure uninterrupted access to your corporate email, calendar, and documents, you must update your password immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your account and set a new password:

<URL>

After updating, you will receive a confirmation email. If you do not reset your password within 48 hours, your account will be locked and you will lose access to all Microsoft 365 services.

For assistance, call our support hotline at 1800-123-456 or email support@company.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Microsoft Account Security Team
